subject: Coordination brief: symposium activities around South Europe | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-0317
body: Intelligence from South Europe indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the symposium banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace. Reference initiative INIT-0317. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
